title: Sargam Health Care | Multispecialty Hospital
heading: THE GREATEST WEALTH IS YOUR HEALTH
text: Sargam Health Care | Multispecialty Hospital +91-9354030578, +91-9953086416 sargamhealthcare@gmail.com Home About Us Contact us MEDIA, MESSAGE & ACTIVITIES Select Page 24X7 Emergency Medical Facility Available THE GREATEST WEALTH IS YOUR HEALTH SARGAM HEALTH CARE, situated in Samalka, South-West Delhi is affordable multispeciality hospital run by Managing Director Smt. Minakshi Yadav with support of Dr. Neeraj Jha and efficient medical team. Sargam Health Care has highly qualified Consultants, Doctors, and dedicated team of Medical Professionals providing best patient advise & treatment. We believe the utmost care for understanding the diverse need of our patients, offer quality and affordable medical treatment to them. At SARGAM HEALTH CARE, we are committed to providing exceptional healthcare with compassion, integrity, and excellence. As a trusted name in medical care, our hospital offers a wide range of diagnostic, therapeutic, and surgical services across a wide spectrum of specialities. We understand that health is your most Valuable asset, and we are here to support you every step of the way from preventive care and early diagnostic to treatment and recovery. Our team of highly trained, doctors, nurses, and healthcare professionals work around the clock to ensure each patient receives personalized and quality care in a safe and supportive environment. We are also passionate and time to time organise the Social Care Activities. In association with SWASTHAM TRUST we care for the needful patients by offering them free doctor consultation, medicines, investigation and hospital admission at reasonable price. We also support the cancer patients from lower-middle class family helping in their high-cost cancer treatment. Let’s have a look our endeavours:- View More Quality Team of Doctors Our Recovered Patients Facilities Available at Sargam Health Care Day Care Fully Equipped operation Theatre ECG Private Ward General Ward In-house Pharmacy Well-equipped Operation Theater Oxygen Facility 24 x 7 Doctor Available Why Choose Us Patient First Our patient’s needs are our first priority, and patient care comes first for us. We aim to provide our patients with individualized and caring care on a daily basis. Quality & Affordable The most important element of the right to health is access to quality treatment, and we offer our patients safe, efficient, patient-centered, and inexpensive care. All Services under one roof We house comprehensive diagnostic centers and unrivaled medical services all under one roof. We focus on creating a secure and comfortable work atmosphere and support all moral behavior while providing a range of medical treatments. Our Excellence Services We provide one of the best services all over India. We have a high success rate of recovered patients. Professional Doctor We have a team of professional and experienced doctors. Pharmacy You don’t need to go anywhere to get the medicines because we are soon to introduce our pharmacy 24X7. Operation Theater We have a fully-functional operation theater with all the required equipment. Our Department We have different departments in our hospital with expert doctors. Qualified Doctors 24X7 Emergency Services Feel Like Home Services Call 7669929200 Orthopedic Orthopedics is the branch of medicine that focuses on the diagnosis and treatment of conditions affecting the musculoskeletal system, including bones, joints, muscles, tendons, and ligaments. Orthopedic specialists are physicians who specialize in the treatment of these conditions. Qualified Doctors 24X7 Emergancy Services Feel Like Home Services Call 7669929200 Gynecology Gynecology is the branch of medicine that deals with the female reproductive system and related disorders. Gynecologists are medical doctors who specialize in the diagnosis and treatment of conditions related to the female reproductive system, including menstrual disorders, fertility issues, pregnancy and childbirth, and menopause. Qualified Doctors 24X7 Emergancy Services Feel Like Home Services Book Now Pediatric Pediatrics is the branch of medicine that deals with the medical care of infants, children, and adolescents, from birth up to the age of 18. Pediatricians are medical doctors who specialize in the diagnosis and treatment of childhood illnesses, growth and development, and the prevention of illnesses in children.
